text: anyone else find the dependency array just... stressful?
it's honestly the main reason i still prefer class components sometimes. at least you knew where the lifecycle methods started and ended.
lol, hard disagree. once you stop thinking about them as lifecycle methods and start thinking about them as synchronization points, it clicks.
wait what do you mean by synchronization points?
it means you're syncing your state to the outside world, not just running code when a component mounts.
this is the kind of stuff they never teach in the official docs
the docs are fine, you just have to read them like three times before it makes sense
i still have nightmares about infinite loops from useEffect
the classic mistake is mutating state inside the effect without a dependency, or worse, updating the same state you're listening to.
oh god, the infinite re-render loop. my browser tab still has ptsd.
idk i still think the whole hooks paradigm is just a mess compared to solidjs signals.
